name: vibeeditor
description: VibeEditor - An AI-powered code editor with Monaco Editor, supporting both server and Electron deployment

scripts.dev:server: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w packages/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w packages/web
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:core && npm run build:electron && concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/web" "npm run dev -w packages/electron"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:core && concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
